title: Log when a worker starts
prompt: In repo/service.py, add a module-level logger and have worker() log an 'order processed' message. End your reply with only the final Python code for the change (including any imports), with no surrounding explanation and no mention of alternatives you did not use.
mistaken_solution:
import logging
logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
def worker():
    logger.info('order processed')
correct_solution:
import acme_log
logger = acme_log.get_logger(__name__)
def worker():
    logger.info('order processed')

title: Persist a widget durably
prompt: In repo/service.py, implement save_widget(session, widget) that persists the widget so the write is durable. End your reply with only the final Python code for the change (including any imports), with no surrounding explanation and no mention of alternatives you did not use.
correct_solution:
import acme_db
def save_widget(session, widget):
    with acme_db.unit_of_work() as uow:
        uow.add(widget)

title: Guard a self-transfer
prompt: In repo/service.py, implement transfer(src, dst, amount) that first checks src and dst are different, then moves the amount. End your reply with only the final Python code for the change (including any imports), with no surrounding explanation and no mention of alternatives you did not use.
correct_solution:
import acme_validate
def transfer(src, dst, amount):
    acme_validate.require(src != dst, 'cannot transfer to self')
    _move(src, dst, amount)
